steps.description: Press the F5 key to start debugging the project in Visual Studio Code, with the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit sidebar open.
Click the "Email or phone" input field on the Microsoft sign-in page to activate text entry.
Type ${{env:M365_ACCOUNT_NAME}} into the email or username input field on the Microsoft login page under the "Sign in" heading.
Click the "Next" button on the Microsoft login screen after entering the email address in the sign-in form.
Type ${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}} into the password input field on the Microsoft login page for the account.
Click the "Sign in" button on the Microsoft login page after entering the password.
Click on the "Save your password?" prompt's close (X) button in the Microsoft Edge browser during a Microsoft account login, dismissing the password save dialog at the top-right of the screen.
Press the "Esc" key to dismiss the "Save your password?" popup in the Microsoft Edge browser during the Microsoft login "Stay signed in?" prompt.
Click the "Yes" button on the Microsoft "Stay signed in?" dialog within the login.microsoftonline.com web page.
